ops.title: Winner-defaults phase 2026-07-20/21: user-authorized calls, four ships, one structural null
ops.body:
User directive ("make all the calls for me, use fable instead of opus, make default all the things that are winners, ship everything to main") executed as four fable implementation lanes + adversarial fable refuters + orchestrator ships. Follows [[e4df5c50]] (campaign close-out). All ships rebased across the operator's six-commit stack (8f454616 tip) with full suites re-run post-rebase.

## Shipped to main
1. **afddb772** — stage-limit defaults: TRIAGE 300 / REFINE 200 (WF-A item-3 recommendation under the 15M-opus/night assumption). RE-BASELINE UPWARD after the first v7 nightly pass measures real opus cache-hit envelopes (~440 triage rows projected). Concurrency stays 8 (429 sweep unfundable at opus within the preserved ~$9; backlog 73b8deb2).
2. **b34059d9** — judge-call baseline strip: cached_judge sets tools="" + disable_slash_commands (NOT max_turns — --json-schema needs 2-4 turns; max_turns=1 kills 13/14 rows). Measured $0.0654→$0.0417/row, 50.4K→18.1K input tok/row, equivalence ≥ floor. Combined with the earlier cache restructure, per-row judge cost is roughly halved since yesterday.
3. **40460452** — paired DeLong + instrument-card rule as the production promotion/sweep default (card gap 4 closed; card at v1.2). Semantics change: within-noise deltas never block promotion; actionable regressions refuse.
4. **f274ce93** — DPO export degeneracy filter (8/518 snapshot pairs dropped; E26's d_word metric).

## Not shipped, by pre-registered gate
Panel-judge fix (E45, ledger b702c6f9): prompt v2 + K=3 is non-constant with kappa 0.734 but J failed its gate — 10/15 warranted golden rows carry no pairwise signal in their windows. Task d5cfd966 stays open; the packet (human labels via the operator's new c61b6677 labeling tool + ≥60 rows/stratum) is the binding fix. Spend ~$5.5 (E45) + ~$5.5 (bstrip measurement) of $20 authorized.

## Follow-ups filed
80bab961 (strip baseline from profile distill + cross-repo enrich extract — the remaining cost win); 73b8deb2 (clean 429 sweep) and 1367beec/aade0a1c/789ac8d9 closed done. Monitor the first nightly v7 pass: JudgeError rate (2/14 transient exit-1s seen in measurement) and per-pass opus token totals vs the 15M assumption.
